note: Claude's rolling work-log for the AZ product + growth loop. Updated every session as things ship / start / pause. 'shipped' = live on main; the growth engine's own actions are in your daily email brief.

items.title: Desktop + mobile UI/UX polish pass
items.detail: Screenshotted every template at real device widths (fixed a headless-Chrome 500px-min artifact first). Fixes: nav links no longer wrap to two lines on desktop (nowrap + tighter spacing + collapse-to-hamburger raised to 1080px where the full row actually fits) — applies to all 34 pages; homepage hero rebalanced (185-word lead → ~55 words) so the portrait/CTA no longer sit beside a dead empty column; 'In plain words' set to a comfortable reading measure; phone top bar (brand + language pills + hamburger) now fits cleanly from 360px up (live site was clipping the hamburger off-screen). A/B hero-headline experiment untouched.

items.title: Full-context growth research + proactive plan
items.detail: Researching AZ's growth opportunities — keywords, content gaps, link/AEO magnets, conversion levers, competitors — to proactively build what moves the needle, then executing it automatically.

items.title: Delivery commission calculator (free)
items.detail: Interactive link + lead + AEO magnet: shows what DoorDash/Uber/Grubhub cost per year vs going direct. Featured on the guides hub, linked from the delivery guide, added to the sitemap.

items.title: "Should you leave DoorDash?" ROI calculator
items.detail: Break-even + annual-savings calculator comparing app commissions vs first-party ordering — owns the core 'pay once you're saving' decision. Wired into the guides hub + cross-linked with the delivery calc.

items.title: Growth operating plan (research synthesized)
items.detail: Full-context growth research → a living, prioritized roadmap (research/az-growth-operating-plan.md): calculators, cost-hub pages, programmatic tool pages, AEO plumbing, conversion off-ramps, local pages. I execute against it automatically.

items.title: Cost-hub pages (real 2026 math)
items.detail: 'How much does DoorDash really cost', restaurant POS 3-year TCO, online ordering cost, restaurant website cost — extractable-answer format (AI-citation friendly), real data, linked to the calculators. New 'How much does it cost?' section on the guides hub; sitemap 130.

items.title: Demand sensor (free, real search data)
items.detail: The engine now harvests Google Autocomplete daily (no API cost) for our buyer topics → surfaces real 'what people search' + content gaps in the brief to drive content + A/B. First run: 86 real queries, 13 gaps.

items.title: AI-recommendation rank tracker (opt-in)
items.detail: sensors/ai_visibility.py: asks a web-grounded LLM 'who would you recommend for <query>' across our target buyer questions, logs whether AZ is cited + which competitor domains AI keeps citing (the out-publish list). Cost-capped, weekly, opt-in (AI_VISIBILITY_ENABLED=1). --mode aivis.

items.title: AEO fixes: AI-readable calculators + AZ/Arizona entity
items.detail: Calculators were JS-only (AI can't run JS) → added the formula + worked example as static text so AI can read/cite them. Fixed the brand collision: schema now clarifies 'AZ' = founder Abbas Zoeb's initials, a Houston consultancy, not Arizona.

items.title: 4 high-value pages (from the intelligence report)
items.detail: Flagship AEO guide 'get recommended by ChatGPT & Gemini' (HowTo schema, blue-ocean), 'do restaurants lose money on DoorDash' (top-funnel → calculators), the Houston local page (LocalBusiness schema, most-winnable commercial SERP), and 'commission-free ordering systems compared'. Wired into the guides hub + schema; sitemap 134.

items.title: First-party GSC query sensor
items.detail: Wire real Search Console query data (impressions/clicks/position) into the engine once the service account is granted GSC access (owner step given).

items.title: SEO/AEO content velocity
items.detail: Writing high-intent comparison + how-to pages in batches (agents write → I verify → ship). This is the main traffic lever now.

items.title: A/B experiment running
items.detail: Hero-headline test live (control vs value-forward). Engine measures daily; auto-decides once ~200 sessions/variant. Currently gathering data (traffic-limited).

items.title: 6 comparison + how-to pages
items.detail: Toast vs Clover, Square vs Toast, DoorDash vs Uber Eats vs Grubhub, Otter vs Deliverect vs ItsaCheckmate, AI-phone cost, online ordering without DoorDash. Wired into guides hub + sitemap (124 URLs).

items.title: SEO/AEO foundation + GSC
items.detail: llms.txt, strengthened entity schema (LinkedIn sameAs, serviceType, knowsAbout), guides CollectionPage schema, robots hygiene, Google Search Console verified + sitemap submitted.

items.title: Read-receipt + 'since last reply' recap
items.detail: When you reply, the engine emails back what it understood + what it'll do; the next brief recaps prior requests + outcomes.

items.title: A/B testing engine
items.detail: Client-side experiment runner + engine lifecycle: propose → owner-approved start → measure per variant → z-test auto-promote winners / revert losers. Owner approves the start; data decides.

items.title: Autonomous growth loop
items.detail: Daily GA4 sense → visual HTML brief email → reply-to-approve/instruct (Claude actioner) → validated, revertible, scope-fenced edits → deploy. Runs on GitHub Actions cron; failure alerts; lead-rate objective; idempotent; reply-reads every 15 min.

items.title: Guarded analytics dashboard (Hugging Face)
items.detail: Private GA4 dashboard: traffic, top pages, section funnel, conversions, sources. Auto-deploys from analytics/.

items.title: GA4 + GTM analytics
items.detail: Granular auto-tracking (every click, section view, conversion) + Google Tag Manager container for future pixels.

items.title: Positioning reframe + proof
items.detail: USP = you (engineer + operator) as one platform; platform section, elevated voice-AI showcase, proof bar (4.6★/872 reviews), case study, onepager refresh.

items.title: Wok → AZ bridge
items.detail: flagship/ capability ledger + sync protocol + case study: proven-at-restaurant flows into the AZ product automatically.

items.title: More content batches
items.detail: Square vs Clover, OpenTable vs Resy vs Tock, top AI-phone tools head-to-head, more 'how much does X cost' pages, Houston/halal niche pages.

items.title: Onepager PDF + translations + finder-to-layers
items.detail: Regenerate the leave-behind PDF, translate new copy (Hindi/Urdu), tie the tool-finder to the 5 platform layers.

items.title: Voice line go-live check
items.detail: The 'call & test it' CTA uses (281) 362-5354 — waiting on that AI line being live; will verify and adjust the CTA if not.

items.title: Case-study hard numbers
items.detail: 3 outcome numbers (commission recovered $, direct-vs-3P shift, calls captured) need you before they go on the live case study.

items.title: Indexation setup
items.detail: GSC verified, sitemap fetched (124 URLs), Bing import available. Google is now crawling — done.
